prompt: Create a surreal ultra-luxury Apple AirPods Pro advertisement featuring a miniature man sitting confidently inside an enormous open white AirPods charging case, with two gigantic glossy white earbuds resting in the case behind him. The tiny character should preserve the uploaded face identity exactly and wear a loose premium white button-up shirt, black trousers, white sneakers, and a silver chain necklace. He is posed casually with one arm leaning on the left earbud, one knee raised, and one leg hanging over the front edge of the case. Add exactly 2 oversized earbuds, each with a black speaker grille and a vivid blue glowing LED accent. Behind the earbuds, show the open case lid with two large molded circular recesses. Add translucent futuristic sound-wave ribbons flowing horizontally across the scene, glowing softly in pale blue and white, weaving around the earbuds and behind the character. The Apple logo is visible on the front of the case. Set the scene in a sleek modern high-rise interior at night with a blurred blue city skyline through a window in the background. Use a vertical 9:16 composition, hyper-realistic cinematic product photography, glossy ceramic surfaces, soft studio lighting, cool blue-gray color palette, shallow depth of field, premium commercial aesthetic, ultra-clean reflections, realistic scale contrast, and no extra text or watermark.
